title: sideritis fruticulosa f. cavanillesii
intro: Sideritis fruticulosa f. cavanillesii, also known as Cavanilles' Rock Tea or Rock Tea, is a subspecies of the Sideritis fruticulosa plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sideritis fruticulosa f. cavanillesii include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions, as well as offering potential protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. Sideritis fruticulosa f. cavanillesii can be prepared as a herbal tea, often combined with other plants, and has also been used in traditional medicine as a dried herb or in capsule form.
